scripts.build: node tools/clean-vitepress-dist.js && node tools/extract-article.js && node tools/localize-images.js && node tools/vitepress-migration/index.js && vitepress build docs && node tools/copy-vitepress-dist.js
scripts.dev: node tools/extract-article.js && node tools/localize-images.js && node tools/vitepress-migration/index.js && vitepress dev docs --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5178
